{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Soulsmith Serenity
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Elder Serenity was confirmed slain in battle.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Soulsmith Serenity]] is a [[Soulsmith]] of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Elder Harbek, Elder Nasiri, and Elder Serenity were all confirmed slain in battle,”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
